data.config.yaml:
server:
  addr: ":5000"

storage:
  path: /data/registry
  cache_size_mb: 2048
  gc:
    enabled: true
    schedule: "0 3 * * *"
    keep_recent: 20

mirrors:
  - name: docker.io
    upstream: https://registry-1.docker.io
    cache_ttl: 24h
  - name: quay.io
    upstream: https://quay.io
    cache_ttl: 24h
  - name: gcr.io
    upstream: https://gcr.io
    cache_ttl: 24h
  - name: ghcr.io
    upstream: https://ghcr.io
    cache_ttl: 24h
  - name: registry.k8s.io
    upstream: https://registry.k8s.io
    cache_ttl: 24h

auth:
  type: none

releases:
  enabled: true
  pull_secret: /secrets/pull-secret.json
